title: Selected work
summary: A few engagements where ownership of architecture, product impact, and delivery mattered. Outcomes over tasks.

items.title: Nesto
items.content:
Outcomes

  • Centralized architecture as the foundation for all projects—consistency, efficiency, and maintainability.
  • Technical leadership: one voice for architecture, standards, and team alignment.
  • Ongoing evolution: monitoring, maintenance, and optimization so the system stays fit for purpose.
Tech Stack

PHP, JavaScript (ES6+), 95 React blocks for Gutenberg, REST and external APIs, custom WordPress, MySQL, Salesforce for lead creation, Webpack for theme variations.

items.title: Compare Mortgages
items.content:
Outcomes

  • Architecture that supports mortgage loan analysis and comparison with clear structure and delivery milestones.
  • Alignment between design, front-end, and back-end—priorities and timelines defined so delivery stays on track.
  • UX and tooling: prototypes, A/B testing, and data analysis tools integrated into the product.
Tech Stack

PHP, JavaScript (ES6+), REST and external APIs, custom WordPress, MySQL, Salesforce for lead creation, Webpack for theme variations.

items.title: BrightWize
items.content:
Outcomes

  • Feasibility and strategy: timelines, resources, and work phases defined so execution stays viable.
  • Architecture and stack: technology choices and technical prerequisites for deployment and future growth.
  • Ongoing oversight: progress monitoring, problem-solving, and alignment with project vision and quality standards.
Tech Stack

Laravel, MySQL, React calculators for mortgages, web scraping, scoping, estimation, and code reviews.
